analysis_result: cg26878949 and cg13227982 are the two PTCH1 promoter CpG probes hypermethylated in MPNST-G1 but not MPNST-G2. cg26878949 (TSS1500, CpG Island; mean beta G1=0.520 vs G2=0.190; delta=+0.329; Welch t-test p=0.004). cg13227982 (TSS1500, South Shore of CpG Island; mean beta G1=0.889 vs G2=0.628; delta=+0.261; p=0.00032). Both probes map to the PTCH1 TSS1500 region on chr9 (MAPINFO 98279753 and 98279956). These two probes are the only PTCH1 promoter CpGs meeting both criteria of delta_beta > 0.2 and t-test p < 0.05 between G1 (n=8) and G2 (n=8).
denominator_used: 16 MPNST tumors with EPIC methylation data (MPNST_G1 n=8: M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M3398, M6712, M803; MPNST_G2 n=8: M1677, M1933, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413, M9450). 24 PTCH1 promoter probes (TSS200/TSS1500) evaluated from the EPIC manifest, all present in GSE207207 beta matrix.
assumptions_made: Promoter region defined as probes whose UCSC_RefGene_Group annotation for PTCH1 is TSS200 or TSS1500 (strict pairing of gene-name and group-label positions in semicolon-delimited lists); used average beta values as provided in GSE207207_average_beta_values.txt.gz without re-preprocessing; tumor IDs matched between clinical metadata and beta matrix column names after stripping whitespace (M3398 had trailing space in beta matrix); Welch's t-test (equal_var=False) used without multiple-testing correction since only 24 probes evaluated; 'hypermethylated in G1 only' operationalized as delta_beta(G1-G2) > 0.2 AND t-test p < 0.05.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- Clinical data: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx sheet 'Clinical Data' (108 samples x 15 cols)
- Beta values: GSE207207_average_beta_values.txt.gz (probes x 108 samples, tab-separated gzip)
- EPIC manifest: GPL21145_MethylationEPIC_15073387_v-1-0.csv.gz (868,565 probes x 47 fields, skip 7 header rows)
- Note: sample M3398 has trailing whitespace in beta matrix column name

B. COHORT DEFINITION
- MPNST_G1 (Methylation_Group = 'MPNST_G1'): n=8 tumors (M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M3398, M6712, M803)
- MPNST_G2 (Methylation_Group = 'MPNST_G2'): n=8 tumors (M1677, M1933, M2325, M2377, M2491, M4719, M9413, M9450)
- All 16 samples present in beta matrix.

C. VARIABLE CODING
- Probe filter 1 (gene): UCSC_RefGene_Name contains 'PTCH1' -> 78 probes
- Probe filter 2 (promoter): at least one (gene, group) pair is (PTCH1, TSS200) or (PTCH1, TSS1500) -> 24 probes
- Outcome variables: mean_G1, mean_G2, delta = mean_G1 - mean_G2, Welch's t-test p-value

D. COMPUTATION
- For each of 24 PTCH1 promoter probes, compute mean beta in G1 and G2, delta, and Welch's t-test p-value (scipy.stats.ttest_ind, equal_var=False)
- 'Hypermethylated in G1 only' criterion: delta > 0.2 AND p < 0.05

E. RESULT
Two probes meet both criteria:
1) cg26878949 - TSS1500, CpG Island, MAPINFO 98279753; mean G1=0.520, mean G2=0.190, delta=+0.329, p=0.00398
2) cg13227982 - TSS1500, South Shore, MAPINFO 98279956; mean G1=0.889, mean G2=0.628, delta=+0.261, p=0.000319

Near-miss probe: cg04334429 (TSS200, Island, MAPINFO 98279419) had delta=+0.221 but p=0.074 (not significant).

F. CAVEATS
- Used precomputed average beta values from GSE207207, not re-preprocessed from IDATs
- No multiple testing correction applied (n=24 probes); if Bonferroni applied alpha=0.05/24=0.0021, cg13227982 still passes but cg26878949 (p=0.004) would be marginal
- Small sample size (n=8 per group) limits statistical power
- Identified hypermethylated probes cluster at/near the CpG island containing the PTCH1 transcription start (chr9:98279400-98280000), consistent with canonical promoter CpG island hypermethylation
